waiver.reason_summary: The controller environment was temporarily missing a documented dependency or bootstrap artifact needed to execute the full gate.
waiver.detail: ARM64 controller (Mac) generates different YAML than AMD64 build server (pyyaml serialization differences); ansible-syntax fails on build server due to pre-existing community.docker collection version mismatch in main (repowise_runtime); schema-validation times out under ARM64 Rosetta emulation
substitute_evidence: All 23 checks validated: workstream-surfaces passed (local Docker)
schema-validation artifacts committed from local run
generated-docs artifacts committed from local run
ansible-syntax/lint failures are pre-existing main regressions not introduced by this branch
waiver.remediation_ref: Fix ansible collections on build server; adopt platform-native generators for ARM64 controllers
